info.name: Química Sur — HubSpot ↔ SAP Integration Tests
info.description:
Suite de pruebas E2E para validar creación, actualización y vinculación de objetos entre HubSpot CRM y SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

**Orden de ejecución:**
1. [HS] Create Company
2. [HS] Create Contact
3. [HS] Create Deal + Associations
4. [HS] Associate Contact → Company
5. [HS] Verify Company
6. [HS] Verify Contact
7. [HS] Verify Deal + Associations
8. [SAP] Fetch CSRF Token
9. [SAP] Create BP Org (Company)
10. [SAP] Get BP Org → Customer Number
11. [SAP] Create BP Persona (Contact)
12. [SAP] Get BP Persona → Address + Customer
13. [SAP] Create Email on BP Persona
14. [SAP] Create Phone on BP Persona
15. [SAP] Create SalesOrder (Deal)
16. [SAP] Verify BP Org
17. [SAP] Verify BP Persona
18. [SAP] Verify SalesOrder
19. [HS] Update Company
20. [HS] Update Contact
21. [HS] Update Deal
22. [SAP] Refresh CSRF Token
23. [SAP] Get BP Org ETag
24. [SAP] Update BP Org
25. [SAP] Get BP Persona ETag
26. [SAP] Update BP Persona
27. [SAP] Get SalesOrder ETag
28. [SAP] Update SalesOrder

**Variables automáticas:**
Los IDs se extraen automáticamente entre requests via Test Scripts.

pm.test('BP Persona data matches HubSpot Contact', () => {
